query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, mu.count, mu.month, s.plan FROM users u LEFT JOIN monthly_usage mu ON u.id = mu.user_id LEFT JOIN subscriptions s ON u.id = s.user_id WHERE u.id = 1;
